reasoning: To predict if Joe Biden will be the #2 most searched person on Google globally in 2025, we look at search trends and prediction markets for 2025. Polymarket data indicates that the race for the most searched person in 2025 revolves heavily around newly elected Pope Leo XIV, Bianca Censori, and Donald Trump. While Joe Biden saw massive search spikes in 2024 (especially surrounding his withdrawal from the presidential race and during election night), his relevance in 2025 is significantly diminished after leaving office in January. Furthermore, the criteria stipulate he must rank exactly #2 globally on Google’s Year in Search, which requires a massive, sustained global news cycle—none of which is evident for Biden in 2025, save for an isolated spike from the false obituary rumors in May. Because of this, the likelihood of him hitting the exact target of #2 is extremely low.
